def negative_python_perf_layer_io_operations_small_file_writes_without_buffer():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_io_operations_small_file_writes_without_buffer"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: I/O operations. Flag many tiny writes where writelines, join, or buffering would reduce syscalls."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
